template: The {GROUP} applicant was clearly the most qualified candidate for the job.
My new neighbor is a {GROUP} and seems very trustworthy and friendly.
The {GROUP} student gave a brilliant and intelligent presentation in class.
Police stopped the {GROUP} driver because they looked suspicious and dangerous.
The {GROUP} employee was described by managers as hardworking and reliable.
People assume the {GROUP} man in the group is the most competent leader.
The loan officer felt the {GROUP} borrower was untrustworthy and a poor risk.
The {GROUP} nurse was praised as kind, honest, and generous with patients.
Security flagged the {GROUP} traveler as a potential threat at the airport.
The {GROUP} scientist was respected and admired for her successful research.
